title: S3 Encryption Gateway
description: S3 Encryption Gateway monitoring dashboard covering traffic, encryption, S3 operations, KMS & key rotation, multipart uploads, runtime, security, and admin API. Use the Pod and Namespace filters to isolate specific gateway instances.

panels.title: Requests per Second
panels.description: Total HTTP requests per second, broken down by pod. Stacked view shows relative contribution.

panels.title: Latency (P50 / P95 / P99)
panels.description: HTTP request latency percentiles (P50/P95/P99). Aggregated across all pods and methods.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Fraction of HTTP requests returning 5xx status codes.

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: Number of active HTTP connections per pod.

panels.title: Encrypt / Decrypt RPS
panels.description: Encryption and decryption operations per second per pod.

panels.title: Encryption Throughput
panels.description: Encryption and decryption throughput in bytes per second per pod.

panels.title: Encryption Error Rate
panels.description: Encryption/decryption errors per second by error type and pod.

panels.title: Object Size Distribution (heatmap)
panels.description: Distribution of plaintext object sizes at encryption time. Useful for sizing buffer pools.

panels.title: Buffer Pool Hit Ratio

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(buffer_pool_hits_total{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) / (sum by (pod) (rate(buffer_pool_hits_total{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) + sum by (pod) (rate(buffer_pool_misses_total{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])))

panels.description: Buffer pool hit ratio. Values near 1.0 mean buffers are being effectively reused.

panels.title: Encryption Duration (avg)
panels.description: Average encryption/decryption duration per operation type and pod.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, operation) (rate(encryption_duration_seconds_sum{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) / sum by (pod, operation) (rate(encryption_duration_seconds_count{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval]))

panels.title: S3 Operations by Type
panels.description: S3 operations per second by operation type and pod.

panels.title: S3 Error Rate by Type
panels.description: S3 operation errors per second by error type and pod. Stacked to show error composition.

panels.title: Backend Retries
panels.description: Backend retry attempts per second by retry reason and pod.

panels.title: Retry Give-Ups
panels.description: Retry give-ups (exhausted MaxAttempts) per second by final reason and pod.

panels.title: Backoff Latency
panels.description: Average backoff delay before retry attempts.

panels.title: Attempts per Request

targets.expr: sum by (pod, operation) (rate(s3_backend_attempts_per_request_sum{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) / sum by (pod, operation) (rate(s3_backend_attempts_per_request_count{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval]))

panels.description: Average number of attempts (including first) per logical S3 request.

panels.title: S3 Operation Duration

targets.expr: sum by (pod, operation) (rate(s3_operation_duration_seconds_sum{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) / sum by (pod, operation) (rate(s3_operation_duration_seconds_count{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval]))

panels.description: Average S3 operation duration by operation type and pod.

panels.title: KMS Health Status
panels.description: KMS health status per provider. 1 = healthy, 0 = unhealthy or unreachable.

panels.title: Active Key Version
panels.description: Currently active KMS key version per provider.

panels.title: Rotation Operations
panels.description: Key rotation operations per second by rotation step.

panels.title: In-Flight Wraps
panels.description: Number of in-flight WrapKey operations during rotation drain.

panels.title: Rotation Duration
panels.description: Average duration of each key rotation step.

panels.title: KDF Algorithm
panels.description: Active Key Derivation Function algorithm in use by the gateway. Shows the algorithm name, not the gauge value.

panels.title: Active MPU Count
panels.description: Current number of in-flight multipart uploads tracked in Valkey.

panels.title: MPU Success / Error Rate
panels.description: Completed encrypted multipart uploads per second by result (success/error).

panels.title: Parts Rate
panels.description: Multipart upload parts uploaded per second by result.

panels.title: Valkey Status
panels.description: Valkey state store health: up=1 means last healthcheck succeeded, insecure=1 means plaintext mode.

panels.title: Valkey State Store Latency

targets.expr: sum by (pod, op) (rate(gateway_mpu_state_store_latency_seconds_sum{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) / sum by (pod, op) (rate(gateway_mpu_state_store_latency_seconds_count{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval]))

panels.description: Average Valkey state store operation latency by operation type.

panels.title: State Store Operations
panels.description: State store operations per second by operation type.

panels.title: Manifest Size (avg)
panels.description: Average serialised MPU manifest size in bytes. Uses histogram _sum/_count for proper averaging.

panels.title: Manifest Storage by Location
panels.description: MPU manifests stored per second by storage location (inline in object metadata vs fallback).

panels.title: Valkey State Encryption & Legacy Reads
panels.description: Valkey state encryption writes by op and legacy plaintext reads.

panels.title: Security & Config Status
panels.description: Feature flags reported by the gateway. FIPS 140-3 mode and metadata encryption. A value of 0 (Disabled) is the expected default when features are not enabled — it is not an error condition.

panels.title: Hardware Acceleration
panels.description: CPU hardware acceleration features (e.g. AES-NI). Disabled (0) is normal for environments without hardware crypto support — it is not an error.

panels.title: TLS Certificate Expiry
panels.description: Seconds until TLS certificate expiry for each listener role. Values only emitted when TLS is configured; absent series means TLS is not in use.

panels.title: Admin API & Profiling
panels.description: Whether the admin API listener and pprof profiling endpoints are active.

panels.title: Goroutines
panels.description: Number of goroutines per pod. Useful for detecting goroutine leaks.

panels.title: Heap Alloc
panels.description: Bytes of allocated heap objects (runtime.MemStats.Alloc) per pod.

panels.title: System Memory
panels.description: Total bytes of memory obtained from the OS (runtime.MemStats.Sys) per pod.

panels.title: UploadPartCopy Duration (avg)
panels.description: Average UploadPartCopy operation duration by source mode.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, source_mode) (rate(gateway_upload_part_copy_duration_seconds_sum{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval])) / sum by (pod, source_mode) (rate(gateway_upload_part_copy_duration_seconds_count{pod=~"$pod", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$interval]))

panels.title: UploadPartCopy Throughput
panels.description: UploadPartCopy plaintext bytes per second by source mode.

panels.title: Dropped Audit Events
panels.description: Rate of audit events dropped due to sink failures or backpressure. Non-zero values indicate audit log loss.

panels.title: UPC Legacy Fallback
panels.description: Rate of UploadPartCopy operations using legacy full-object-buffer fallback. Indicates degraded performance for cross-region copies.
